Solar System Objects
=========

Are there any major Solar System Objects (SSOs) in my Roman images?
-----------------------------

One major inconvenience among astronomers is to `accidentally rediscovering Mars <https://www.astronomerstelegram.org/?read=11449>`_. To avoid that, *ROSALIA* generates quick look maps with the locations of known SSOs. Examples coming soon! 


How far are the Solar System planets from WFI?
-----------------------------

Coming soon!

Are there any asteroids in my Roman images?
-----------------------------

This is an ongoing activity by the *ROSALIA* team. Examples coming soon!
